name: LinkedIn Markdown Formatter
description: Convert Markdown text to LinkedIn-compatible Unicode formatting

tools.name: convert_markdown_to_linkedin
tools.description: Convert Markdown text to LinkedIn-compatible Unicode formatting. Supports bold (**text**), italic (*text*), strikethrough (~~text~~), headers (# ## ###), bullet lists (- or *), numbered lists (1. 2. 3.), links ([text](url)), and blockquotes (> text). Returns formatted text ready to paste into LinkedIn.

markdown.description: Markdown-formatted text to convert for LinkedIn

linkedinText.description: Unicode-formatted text ready to paste into LinkedIn

isOverLimit.description: Whether the text exceeds LinkedIn's 3000 character limit
